moments.title: World Cup Knocks Are Coming
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 group stages are concluding, with the highly anticipated Round of 32 kicking off on Sunday, June 28th, across Canada, Mexico, and the USA.

angles.name: Knockout Stage Excitement
angles.copy: Who's making it through? The World Cup group stages are wrapping up, with the Round of 32 just days away!

angles.name: The Drama Heats Up
angles.copy: Knockout football is almost here! Get ready for the drama as the FIFA World Cup 2026 moves to the next stage from Sunday.

angles.name: Backing Your Team
angles.copy: The World Cup just got serious! Which teams are you backing to go all the way as the Round of 32 approaches?

moments.title: New UK Chart No.1?
moments.blurb: Taylor Swift's 'I Knew It, I Knew You' is currently No.1, but the Official UK Singles Chart is updated tomorrow, Friday, June 26th.

angles.name: Chart Race Tomorrow
angles.copy: Will Taylor Swift hold on to No.1? Find out when the new UK Singles Chart drops tomorrow!

angles.name: New Music Friday Predix
angles.copy: Who do you reckon will be topping the charts this week? New music Friday is here and the race for No.1 is on.

angles.name: Official Chart Predictions
angles.copy: Chart battle latest: Get ready for tomorrow's Official UK Singles Chart update. Any predictions?

moments.title: Love Island Drama Continues
moments.blurb: Love Island UK continues nightly on ITV2 and ITVX, bringing more villa drama, new arrivals, and budding romances to our screens.

angles.name: Favourite Couple?
angles.copy: Who's your favourite couple in the Love Island villa right now? The drama is heating up!

angles.name: This Week's Drama
angles.copy: New bombshells, shocking recouplings... Love Island is delivering! What's been your favourite moment this week?

angles.name: Team Islander
angles.copy: Are you team [Islander A] or team [Islander B]? The Love Island arguments are getting spicy!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Ariana Grande
moments.blurb: Pop superstar Ariana Grande turns 33 tomorrow, June 26th, celebrating a career filled with chart-topping hits and iconic vocals.

angles.name: Ariana's Big Day
angles.copy: Tomorrow, pop icon Ariana Grande celebrates her 33rd birthday! What's your ultimate Ari track?

angles.name: Celebrating Ari
angles.copy: From Nickelodeon to global superstar, happy 33rd birthday to the incredible Ariana Grande tomorrow!

angles.name: Playlist for Ari
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 33rd birthday to Ariana Grande tomorrow! Get ready for a playlist of her biggest hits.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Nicole Scherzinger
moments.blurb: Pussycat Dolls frontwoman and TV personality Nicole Scherzinger turns 48 on Monday, June 29th.

angles.name: Don't Cha Wish It Was Your Birthday?
angles.copy: Don't cha wish it was your birthday? Nicole Scherzinger turns 48 on Monday! What's your favourite Pussycat Dolls track?

angles.name: Celebrating Nicole
angles.copy: Happy 48th Birthday to the fabulous Nicole Scherzinger on Monday! Celebrate with her biggest hits.

angles.name: Pop Star & Judge
angles.copy: From global pop star to X Factor judge, wishing Nicole Scherzinger a very happy 48th birthday on June 29th!

moments.title: Happy 80th Ralf Hütter
moments.blurb: Ralf Hütter, co-founder and lead vocalist of electronic music pioneers Kraftwerk, celebrates his 80th birthday on Tuesday, June 30th.

angles.name: Electronic Music Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating 80 years of electronic music genius! Happy birthday to Kraftwerk's Ralf Hütter on Tuesday.

angles.name: Man Behind The Machines
angles.copy: The man behind the machines! Ralf Hütter of Kraftwerk turns 80 on June 30th. What's your favourite Kraftwerk track?

angles.name: Shaping Modern Music
angles.copy: He shaped the sound of modern music. Wishing a very happy 80th birthday to Kraftwerk's Ralf Hütter on Tuesday!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Missy Elliott
moments.blurb: Iconic rapper, singer, songwriter, and producer Missy Elliott turns 55 on Wednesday, July 1st, celebrating a groundbreaking career.

angles.name: Get Ur Freak On
angles.copy: Get Ur Freak On! The legendary Missy Elliott turns 55 on Wednesday! What's your favourite Missy track?

angles.name: Pioneer of Hip-Hop
angles.copy: Happy 55th birthday to the one and only Missy Elliott on July 1st! A true pioneer of hip-hop and R&B.

angles.name: Favourite Missy Lyric?
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible Missy Elliott, who turns 55 on Wednesday! Drop your favourite Missy lyric!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Ashley Tisdale
moments.blurb: Actress and singer Ashley Tisdale, known for her role as Sharpay Evans in High School Musical, turns 41 on Thursday, July 2nd.

angles.name: We're All In This Together
angles.copy: We're all in this together! Happy 41st birthday to High School Musical's Ashley Tisdale on Thursday!

angles.name: From East High to Pop Star
angles.copy: From East High to pop star, wishing a very happy 41st birthday to Ashley Tisdale on July 2nd!

angles.name: HSM Icon
angles.copy: Sharpay Evans herself! Ashley Tisdale turns 41 on Thursday. What's your favourite High School Musical moment?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Huey Lewis
moments.blurb: Huey Lewis, frontman of Huey Lewis and the News, celebrates his 76th birthday on Sunday, July 5th, known for hits like 'The Power of Love'.

angles.name: The Power of Love
angles.copy: It's the power of love! Happy 76th birthday to the legendary Huey Lewis on Sunday!

angles.name: Go-To Track
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 76th birthday to Huey Lewis on July 5th! What's your go-to Huey Lewis and the News track?

angles.name: Timeless Hits
angles.copy: Still stuck with you! Celebrate Huey Lewis' 76th birthday on Sunday with his timeless hits.
